servinfo.title: Fuel Filler Cap Inspection

attention4.ptxt: Failure to use correct cap can result in EVAP leakage.
If cap requires replacement, be sure to use a cap with genuine SUZUKI parts.

servinfo.ptxt: Remove cap (1), and check gasket for even filler neck imprint, deterioration or any damage. If gasket (2) is defective, replace cap.
